evidence_direction_note: Design-inconclusive: uncommitted_threat_steps=0, uncommitted_neutral_steps=0. Agent is permanently committed post-training (running_variance ~2e-6 << commit_threshold). Readiness gap cannot be measured without any uncommitted steps. C3 (uncommitted_threat_steps >= 20) is structurally impossible given current substrate. Does not constitute evidence for or against MECH-026. Fix direction: pre-convergence eval, forced threshold reset, or awaiting wanting/liking/go-no-go additions that may naturally produce uncommitted-mode windows.
